mechanism: Inhibits BCR‑ABL and FLT3, including ITD mutants
additional_notes: Approved for CML/Ph+ ALL; very potent in FLT3‑ITD AML and MOLM13.

mechanism: Inhibits FLT3, VEGFR, PDGFR and KIT to suppress oncogenic signaling
additional_notes: Approved for RCC/GIST; active in FLT3‑ITD AML lines.

mechanism: Inhibits BCR‑ABL and Src-family kinases to blunt AML signaling
additional_notes: Approved for CML/Ph+ ALL; often synergizes with FLT3 blockade; MOLM13 responsive.

mechanism: Inhibits VEGFR/PDGFR/RAF and FLT3 to reduce proliferation
additional_notes: Approved for CRC/GIST/HCC; anti‑proliferative in FLT3‑ITD AML.
Approved for RCC/thyroid; reported FLT3 inhibition and AML cell suppression.

mechanism: Inhibits MEK1/2, suppressing MAPK signaling downstream of FLT3
additional_notes: Approved for melanoma; activity in AML lines.

mechanism: Inhibits mTORC1, reducing protein synthesis and growth signaling
additional_notes: Approved in transplant/solid tumors; anti‑proliferative in AML via mTOR blockade.

mechanism: Inhibits mTORC1 to block mTOR pathway signaling
additional_notes: Approved for RCC; shows AML line activity.

mechanism: Inhibits the 26S proteasome leading to apoptotic cell death
additional_notes: Approved for MM/MCL; potent cytotoxicity in AML lines including MOLM13.
Approved for MM; strong AML line activity; complementary to bortezomib.

mechanism: Inhibits histone deacetylases causing epigenetic repression of AML growth
additional_notes: Approved for MM; MOLM13 reported sensitive.

mechanism: Inhibits TrxR, inducing oxidative stress and cytotoxicity
additional_notes: Approved for rheumatoid arthritis; robust AML cytotoxicity; MOLM13 reported sensitive.

mechanism: Inhibits mitochondrial protein synthesis, impairing leukemic stem/progenitor metabolism
additional_notes: Active in AML lines including MOLM13.

mechanism: ALDH inhibition with copper‑dependent cytotoxicity in AML cells
additional_notes: Include low‑micromolar copper; activity is copper‑dependent.

mechanism: Disrupts microtubules and hedgehog signaling to inhibit proliferation
additional_notes: Shows AML cytotoxicity including in FLT3‑ITD contexts.

mechanism: Induces ER stress and inhibits PI3K–Akt signaling, causing proteotoxic stress
additional_notes: Induces proteotoxic stress in AML lines.
